document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Niobec Project in North America dated June 2011.pdf
document.description: An updated Mineral Resource estimate and a Preliminary Economic Assessment (PEA) on the viability of an open pit mining option and production expansion at the Niobec Mine.
